title: Rebuild Quick-Groceries delivery app with all features

requirements.text: Implement a complete product catalog backend with CRUD operations for products, categories, and stock management. Support product attributes: name, price, category, description, image, stock quantity, and discount percentage.
acceptanceCriteria: Products can be created, read, updated, and deleted
Products have name, price, category, description, image (blob), stock, and discount fields
Categories can be managed independently
Out-of-stock products are flagged

requirements.text: Implement order management backend: users can place orders with a list of items, delivery address, and payment method. Admins can view all orders and update order status (Pending, Confirmed, Delivered).
acceptanceCriteria: Orders store item list, delivery address, payment method, and status
Users can retrieve their own order history
Admins can list all orders and update order status

requirements.text: Implement delivery charges backend: store a configurable delivery fee, minimum order amount for free delivery threshold, and a free delivery toggle. Expose functions to get and update delivery settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Delivery fee, free delivery threshold, and free delivery toggle are persisted
Delivery settings are retrievable by any user
Only admins can update delivery settings

requirements.text: Implement promo/discount coupon backend: support creating, listing, and deleting promo codes with a discount type (percentage or fixed amount), discount value, minimum order value, usage limit, and expiry date. Expose a function to validate and apply a promo code to an order total.
acceptanceCriteria: Promo codes can be created with code string, discount type, value, min order, usage limit, and expiry
A validate function returns the discount amount for a given code and order subtotal
Expired or fully-used codes are rejected
Admins can list and delete promo codes

requirements.text: Implement promotional offers backend: support creating, listing, and deleting time-limited offers (e.g., festival discounts, seasonal deals) with a title, description, discount percentage, start date, and end date.
acceptanceCriteria: Offers can be created with title, description, discount percentage, start date, and end date
Active offers (within date range) are returned for the storefront
Admins can delete offers

requirements.text: Implement payment records backend: create a payment record linked to an order with status (pending, paid, failed) and payment method. Admins can update payment status.
acceptanceCriteria: Payment records are created alongside orders
Payment status can be updated by admins
Payments are retrievable by order ID and by user

requirements.text: Implement user profile backend: store a user's display name keyed by their Internet Identity principal. Expose get and upsert functions.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can save and retrieve their display name
Profile is keyed by caller principal

requirements.text: Build a homepage with a hero banner featuring the app name 'Quick-Groceries', a tagline, a 'Shop Now' CTA button, a feature highlights strip (fast delivery, fresh products, best prices), category quick-links, and a featured products grid showing up to 8 products with loading skeletons.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays app name, tagline, and Shop Now button
Feature highlights are displayed below the hero
Category links navigate to the products page filtered by category
Up to 8 featured products are shown with skeleton placeholders while loading

requirements.text: Build a product listing page with a search bar and category filter badges. Products load from the backend and filter in real time. Each product card shows image, name, category, price, discount badge, and an Add to Cart button that is disabled when out of stock.
acceptanceCriteria: Search filters products by name in real time
Category badges filter products by category
Out-of-stock products show a disabled Add to Cart button
Discount percentage badge is shown when applicable

requirements.text: Build a shopping cart panel (slide-over) with item list, quantity increment/decrement controls, remove buttons, subtotal, applied delivery charge, and a Checkout button. Cart state persists in sessionStorage.
acceptanceCriteria: Cart shows all added items with quantity controls
Subtotal updates dynamically
Delivery charge is shown based on current delivery settings
Free delivery threshold message is shown when applicable
Empty cart state is displayed when no items are in the cart

requirements.text: Build a checkout page with: delivery address input, payment method selector, promo code entry field with an Apply button that validates the code and shows the discount, order summary with itemized list, subtotal, delivery charge (waived if free delivery applies), discount line, and total. On submission, create the order and payment record, then redirect to an order success page.
acceptanceCriteria: Delivery address is required before placing an order
Promo code field validates against the backend and shows the discount amount or an error
Order summary shows subtotal, delivery fee (or 'Free'), discount, and final total
Successful order placement navigates to the order success page
Active promotional offers are displayed on the checkout page

requirements.text: Build an order success confirmation page that displays order ID, delivery address, itemized products list, pricing breakdown (subtotal, delivery, discount, total), and payment status.
acceptanceCriteria: Order ID is prominently displayed
Full pricing breakdown is shown
Payment status is displayed

requirements.text: Build an order history page for authenticated users showing all their past orders sorted by date, with order status, payment info, and itemized details in collapsible order cards.
acceptanceCriteria: Only visible to authenticated users
Orders are sorted newest first
Each card shows status, date, items, and pricing breakdown

requirements.text: Build an admin dashboard with four tabs: Products (add/edit/delete/toggle stock), Orders (view all, update status), Payments (view all, update status), and Offers (manage promotional offers, promo codes, and delivery settings). Include a 'Seed Demo Data' button that populates sample grocery products.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard is only accessible to users with the Admin role
Products tab supports full CRUD with stock toggle
Orders tab allows status updates
Payments tab allows status updates
Offers tab allows creating/deleting promotional offers and promo codes, and editing delivery settings
Seed Demo Data button populates the backend with sample grocery products

requirements.text: Apply a fresh, vibrant grocery/food market visual theme throughout the app: use a green-dominant color palette with warm accent tones, clean card layouts, rounded corners, bold typography for headings, and a sticky navbar with logo, search bar, navigation links, cart icon with item badge, and login button.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette is consistently green-dominant with warm accents
Navbar is sticky and includes logo, search, nav links, cart badge, and login/logout
All pages use consistent card styles, spacing, and typography
App works in both light and dark modes

requirements.text: Render the generated hero banner image and app logo as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section uses the generated banner image as its background
Navbar displays the generated logo

constraints: App name is Quick-Groceries — use this throughout the UI
All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Currency must be formatted as Indian Rupees (INR)
nonGoals: Real-time order tracking or WebSocket-based updates

required: Wide grocery store hero banner with fresh colorful vegetables, fruits, and grocery items arranged on a vibrant green background with warm lighting (hero-banner.dim_1440x500.png)
Quick-Groceries app logo: a stylized green shopping basket with a small leaf accent, clean and modern on transparent background (app-logo.dim_200x60.png)
